disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound orthopnoea — cannot breathe at all unless sitting bolt upright
trigger_question_examples: Can you breathe at all lying down, or only sitting up?
Do you need to sit upright to breathe?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I — can't — breathe — at all — unless — I'm — sitting — straight up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Coughing up pink, frothy, blood-tinged sputum over the last 30 minutes
trigger_question_examples: Have you coughed up anything, and what does it look like?
Is there any pink or frothy material when you cough?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — pink — frothy — stuff — coming up — when I cough.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Missed regular furosemide (diuretic) dose yesterday and did not wear CPAP mask last night
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken all your regular heart medications, including your water tablet?
Did you use your CPAP machine last night?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I missed my water tablet yesterday, and I didn't wear my CPAP mask last night.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Extreme exhaustion from the ongoing effort of breathing
trigger_question_examples: How tiring is it to keep breathing like this?
Are you getting exhausted from the effort of breathing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm — so tired — from — trying — to breathe.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: [Spouse] Should I help him lie down flat so he can rest?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Should firmly instruct the spouse NOT to lie the patient flat — this would worsen pulmonary congestion — and instead keep him sitting bolt upright with legs dangling, while calling 000 immediately for CPAP/BiPAP-capable ambulance transport.
